name: Barbecued Scallops Hoisin
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Red peppers, cut into 1 1/2-inch squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Alternately thread the red pepper and scallops on wooden skewers, beginning and ending with peppers.
2. Mix together the hoisin, soy, sherry, and sugar in a bowl.
3. Brush the shellfish and peppers with the sauce, coating well.
4. Grill the kebobs over hot coals 4 inches from the heat source for 3 to 4 minutes per side.
5. Remove to a platter and serve.
6 to 8 appetizer portions; 3 main-course portions
